title: Subah Ka Tara
actors: Pradeep Kumar, Shantaram Rajaram Vankudre, Jayshree Gadkar
plot: Padmini a widower comes across Mohan while taking medicine for her mother,her mother has warned h to be away from young men and be in her white clad Saree.After her mother's death she goes to her uncles house whose gone to Africa ...
